HOME EXPERIENCE PROJECTS CERTIFICATES HOBBIES CONTACT

HİLAL NUR GEDİKLİ

I’m a 3rd-year Computer Engineering student at Yıldız Technical University with a passion for building scalable systems and intelligent applications. My goal is to continuously improve myself and tackle problems from distinct perspectives.

Actively exploring new technologies, I focus on turning knowledge into real, working systems—especially within backend development, distributed systems, and AI.

Beyond tech, I’m a licensed ice hockey player. The discipline, teamwork, and resilience I've learned on the ice directly shape my engineering mindset.

EXPERIENCE

Intern – Turkcell

(Jan – Feb 2026)
  • Architecture Evolution (Sync to Async): Designed and developed an internal Spring Boot service from scratch based on provided API specifications, enabling REST-based communication with the BiP TES infrastructure; migrated the system to an asynchronous architecture to eliminate bottlenecks under high message load.
  • Concurrency & Architectural Patterns: Built an asynchronous processing flow using Java thread pools (ExecutorService); applied producer–consumer patterns inspired by Kafka to simulate queue-based handling and maximize throughput. Gained conceptual knowledge of Redis, focusing on its role in system decoupling and caching within high-throughput systems.
  • Scalable Data & Persistence: Designed data persistence using PostgreSQL and optimized large-scale message storage through table partitioning to support high-volume traffic and efficient querying.
  • System Integration & Robustness: Implemented polymorphic DTO structures to support multiple payload types (e.g., multimedia, location) while maintaining strict API contract compliance across the BiP messaging ecosystem.

Intern – National Software Certification Center

(Sep – Nov 2025)
  • Machine Learning & Feature Engineering: Developed Random Forest and MLP regression models to predict NaCl and MgSO₄ concentrations in ppm. Performed feature engineering on multidimensional impedance data, including data cleaning, statistical feature extraction, and model evaluation.
  • Backend Development: Built data processing and model prediction modules using object-oriented programming principles in Python. Updated the database schema for new modules and created independent API layers for data processing, model training, and inference to ensure modularity.
  • Docker & Service Integration: Configured all project services within a Docker Compose environment. Observed inter-service dependencies, network configurations, and shared data volumes.

Trainee – Google Artificial Intelligence and Technology Academy

(Dec 2024 – Feb 2025)
  • AI-Powered Web Applications: Developed modern web applications by integrating LLM-based solutions with high performance backends built on FastAPI, Pydantic, and Alembic.
  • Project Management: Studying Agile and Waterfall methodologies comparatively and analyzing the project management lifecycle. Analyzing the impact of organizational structure and culture on project management.

PROJECTS

LLM-Based E-Commerce Trust Analyzer & Chrome Extension

Developed an end-to-end system that automatically evaluates the reliability of e-commerce websites using LLM-powered data analysis.

Key Features

  • Collected data via web scraping from Şikayetvar, Twitter, and ETBİS
  • Performed sentiment and content analysis using NLP and LLM (Gemini API)
  • Generated dynamic trust scores for e-commerce platforms
  • Delivered results to end-users via a Chrome Extension in real-time

Technologies

FastAPI, Python, Web Scraping, Gemini API, NLP, REST API, Chrome Extension

Multi-User Cite Management System (Django)

Contributed as a core team member in the development of a modular and scalable CMS supporting multiple user roles.

Key Features & Achievements

  • Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) with 3 user types
  • Scalable backend architecture
  • Designed backend system structure
  • Applied object-oriented architecture principles
  • Gained hands-on experience in collaborative development

Technologies

Django, Python, MVC Architecture

Airline Reservation & Management System

Built a comprehensive system simulating real-world airline operations and reservation workflows.

Key Features

  • Concurrent reservation handling using multithreading
  • Implementation of core OOP principles (Encapsulation, Inheritance, Polymorphism, Abstraction)
  • System validation through unit testing

Technologies

Java, OOP, Multithreading, Unit Testing

ML-Based Liquid Quality Prediction System

Developed machine learning models to predict quality parameters of different liquid solutions.

Key Features

  • Trained and compared Random Forest and MLP regression models
  • Predicted ppm values for NaCl and MgSO₄ solutions
  • Performed data preprocessing, model training, and performance evaluation

Technologies

Python, Scikit-learn, TensorFlow, Pandas, NumPy

High-Throughput Messaging Service (Turkcell)

Designed and developed a scalable backend service to handle high-volume messaging workflows within a telecom infrastructure.

Key Features & Scalability

  • Built an async Spring Boot service integrating REST with BiP infrastructure
  • Implemented ExecutorService and Kafka-inspired patterns for high throughput
  • Optimized data storage using PostgreSQL table partitioning
  • Designed polymorphic DTO structures for versatile payload handling

Technologies

Java, Spring Boot, REST API, Multithreading, PostgreSQL
